violations.text: Working container (spray bottle) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Test strips were ordered during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025
